title: Hand off a fresh Clerk session to the Kapter extension.
description: This page only exists to transfer a short-lived session token into the installed extension. Leave this tab open until the extension confirms it has stored the session.

missing-request.title: Invalid bridge request
missing-request.description: Open this route from the extension popup so the request includes a valid bridge identifier.

loadingSignedOut.title: Sign in to continue
loadingSignedOut.description: Authenticate in this browser first, then the page will resend the token automatically.

loadingSignedIn.title: Checking your Clerk session
loadingSignedIn.description: Clerk is loading the active browser session before the handoff can start.

sign-in.title: Sign in to continue
sign-in.description: Authenticate in this browser first, then the page will resend the token automatically.

sending.title: Packaging a fresh session token
sending.description: The bridge is requesting a session token from Clerk now.

waiting.title: Waiting for extension confirmation
waiting.description: The token has been posted to the page. The extension should acknowledge and close this tab.

confirmed.title: Extension connected
confirmed.description: The extension confirmed receipt of the token. This tab can be closed safely.

error.title: Bridge failed
error.description: The bridge could not deliver the token. Retry from the extension popup after fixing the issue below.

prepareTokenError: Unable to prepare a token for the extension.
